summary: Verified SAVE BILL button change and Print button workflow relocation. All 8 test cases passed - button renamed from 'SAVE & PRINT' to 'SAVE BILL', Print button moved to workflow section, bill saves correctly, and navigates to /billing sales page where new bill is listed.

frontend: Navigate to /billing/new - Billing Workspace loads correctly
SAVE BILL button exists (data-testid='save-btn') - Shows 'SAVE BILL' text without 'PRINT'
Old SAVE & PRINT button removed (data-testid='save-print-btn' no longer exists)
Print button exists in workflow section (data-testid='print-btn')
Search 'para' finds Paracetamol 500mg and adds to bill
Click SAVE BILL button saves bill via POST /api/bills
New bill #INV-20260222-0029 appears at top of sales list with Walk-in Customer

critical_code_review_comments: BillingWorkspace.js line 251-293: saveBill() function now only saves and navigates to /billing without print dialog
BillingWorkspace.js line 718-724: Print button moved to workflow section with data-testid='print-btn'
BillingWorkspace.js line 751-763: Save button now shows 'SAVE BILL' instead of 'SAVE & PRINT'
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing product SKU 3004 (Paracetamol 500mg).
context_for_next_testing_agent: SAVE BILL functionality working correctly. Key selectors: data-testid='save-btn' for Save Bill, data-testid='print-btn' for Print (in workflow section). After saving bill, user is redirected to /billing (Operations Dashboard) where new bills are listed. Bill amounts showing ₹0.00 in list is due to server-side calculation - may need investigation if not expected.
